I INTRODUCTION 
I.1 Summary 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator (OMI)  OMI_TEMPSAL_FWC: it 
provides time series of Freshwater Content (FWC). 
It contains 1D (time dimension)  FWC information computed from different reanalysis  (“multi-model” 
approach). OMI_FWC product is available for Arctic region with a water depth greater than 500m  . The 
sampling between each data is one month. The ensemble mean, the spread and single members are 
distributed in the corresponding NetCDF file. 
 
OMI_TEMPSAL_FWC includes one product:  
 ARCTIC_OMI_TEMPSAL_FWC which contains monthly mean time series of FWC averaged over the 
Arctic Ocean.  
These data are computed using GLOR, CGLO, ORAS reanalysis. 
The product is published on the CMEMS dissemination server after automatic and delayed-mode quality 
controls.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for CMEMS Ocean Monitoring Indicator OMI_TEMPSAL_FWC, providing details on Freshwater Content (FWC) time series data in the Arctic region.
